zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean de Béthune於1317年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫洛可倫時，他的父親Guillaume V de Béthune47歲，母親Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ41歲。他和Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於大約1362年在英國蘇格蘭Forfarshire姆洛斯享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean de Béthune于1317年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫洛可倫时，他的父亲Guillaume V de Béthune47岁，母亲Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ41岁。他和Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于大约1362年在英国苏格兰Forfarshire姆洛斯享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Béthune
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin); French (Béthune): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, Picardy, France, recorded in the 8th century in the Latin form Bitunia, probably an adjective (with villa understood) derived from the oblique form of an ancient Germanic personal name Betto, an assimilated form of Berto (see Bert ). See also Scottish Beaton .

variants.name: Beaton
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Béthune in Pas-de-Calais, France (see Bethune ). The Hebridean family of McBeth , hereditary physicians, adopted the surname Beaton in the 16th century.
English: from the Middle English personal name Beton, a diminutive of Bete, a pet form of Beatrice (see Beatrice ). Compare Beat .

variants.name: Bert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Philibert, Pierre.
German, French, and Polish: from a short form of various compound personal names formed with ancient Germanic berht ‘bright, famous’ (see for example Bertram ).
English: from the Middle English female personal name Berte (Old French Berte, from ancient Germanic Berta ).

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean de Béthune was born in 1317, in Lokeren, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Guillaume V de Béthune, was 47 and his mother, Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ, was 41. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux. He died about 1362, in Murroes, Forfarshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean de Béthune est né en 1317, à Lokeren, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Guillaume V de Béthune, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ, avait 41 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux. Il est décédé environ 1362, à Murroes, Forfarshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean de Béthune 1317 in Lokeren, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume V de Béthune 47 und seine Mutter Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ 41. Er hatte mit Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb um 1362 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Murroes, Forfarshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Béthune è nato il nel 1317 nel Lokeren, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Guillaume V de Béthune, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ, aveva 41 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux. Morì circa 1362, nel Murroes, Forfarshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean de Béthuneが1317年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンロケレンで生まれた時，父Guillaume V de Béthuneは47歳，母Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉは41歳であった。彼はJeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meauxとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1362年にイギリススコットランドForfarshireムロースで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean de Béthune(이)가 1317년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 로케런에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume V de Béthune(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ(은)는 41세였다. 그는 Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1362년 영국 스코틀랜드 Forfarshire 머로스에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Westhall, Murroes, parish, Scotland: Murroes, Forfarshire, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean de Béthune nasceu em 1317, em Lokeren, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Guillaume V de Béthune, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ, tinha 41 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1362, em Murroes, Forfarshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean de Béthune родился в 1317 г. в местности локирен, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Guillaume V de Béthune было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ, 41. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux. Он умер около 1362 г. в местности мурроесь, Forfarshire, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean de Béthune nació en 1317, en Lokeren, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Guillaume V de Béthune, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Marie DE ROYE de la FERTÉ, tenía 41 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Jeanne de Coucy Vicomtesse de Meaux. Murió aproximadamente 1362, en Murroes, Forfarshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años.
